remoteInstancesPage.localListenHint: Lokal host and port where this forward listens on your machine.
remoteInstancesPage.localTargetHint: Lokal host and port on your machine that receives traffic from remote -R listener.
remoteInstancesPage.remoteListenHint: Remote host and port where SSH creates the -R listener.
remoteInstancesPage.remoteTargetHint: Remote host and port that receives traffic from lokal -L listener.

remoteInstancesPage.portInUse: Lokal port is already in use. Pick a random free lokal port and erneut versuchen?
remoteInstancesPage.forwardTypeRemoteDesc: Remote (-R): expose a port on the remote machine and send that traffic zurück to this laptop.
remoteInstancesPage.forwardTypeDynamicDesc: Dynamic (-D): erstellen a lokal SOCKS5 proxy on this laptop (for apps that support SOCKS proxy Einstellungen).
remoteInstancesPage.forwardTypeLocalDesc: Lokal (-L): öffnen a port on this laptop and send it to a remote host:port over SSH (use this to access remote Dienste locally).
remoteInstancesPage.forwardTypeHint: Lokal (-L): laptop -> remote Dienst. Remote (-R): remote machine -> this laptop. Dynamic (-D): lokal SOCKS5 proxy.
